name: Lime Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill the evaporated milk in the freezer.
2. Dissolve the gelatin in hot water and chill until partially set.
3. Whip the gelatin until fluffy; stir in sugar and juices.
4. Whip the chilled milk, and fold into the gelatin mixture.
5. Combine crumbs and melted margarine, pressing into a 9 x 13-inch pan.
6. Pour lime liquid over the crumbs.
7. Shave chocolate over top.
8. Freeze. Cut into squares.
Serves 10 to 12
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WA ed. 1974
